description: Полная миграция текстового sci-fi 게임а Broken Dreams Correctional Center с Godot 3.x на Godot 4.4.1. Репозиторий: github.com/Alexofp/BDCC

main_goal.summary: Миграция 3215 .gd файлов, 645 .tscn, 73 .tres с Godot 3.x на Godot 4.4.1
main_goal.current_phase: Phase 1 COMPLETE — stubs filled. Phase 5 ready.

phases.name: Foundation
phases.description: Создание базовой архитектуры: ServiceLocator, EventBus, Component base, RegistryManager

phases.name: Core scripts migration
phases.description: Миграция ключевых файлов: BaseCharacter, MainScene, SceneBase, GameUI, Module, ItemBase, Inventory + stub completion

stubs_completed: GameUI: 15+ methods (tooltips, pagination, scene management, UI textboxes)

phases.name: Batch API fixes
phases.description: 5 проходов batch-миграции API: extends, onready, export, yield, connect, emit_signal, etc.

phases.name: Error elimination
phases.description: Доведение SCRIPT ERROR до 0. Решение циклических зависимостей автозагрузок, reserved keywords, parse errors

details.root_cause: BaseCharacter.gd had duplicate giveBodypart() function (lines 1092 and 1242). GDScript 2.0 rejects duplicate function names, causing 'Could not parse global class' cascade.

phases.name: CrotchCode 2.0 (Phase 4)
phases.description: Визуальное моддинг-API: CrotchScriptBase, CrotchTranspiler, CrotchCompiler, CrotchGraphEditor. Исправлены критические баги: StringName literals, контроль потока, экспорт портов.

files: Systems/CrotchCode/CrotchTranspiler.gd (326 строк — 170+ блоков, правильный контроль потока)
fixes: transpile(): линейный обход → рекурсивный _transpile_blocks с управлением отступами

phases.name: Deep architecture migration
phases.description: Перенос реальной логики из ~3178 файлов: Modules (870), NpcSlavery (113), Scenes (64), SexEngine, InteractionSystem

mimo.description: Основной агент — GDScript миграция, циклические зависимости, архитектурные решения

opencode.description: Вспомогательный агент — scene files, batch операции, верификация, typed annotation cleanup, CrotchCode
opencode.current_task: Phase 4 DONE — CrotchCode + stub verification (10 files, 2 fixes)

T1.title: Fix BaseCharacter.gd parse failure when ModularDialogue enabled
T1.description: BaseCharacter.gd (1249 lines) не парсился когда ModularDialogue autoload включён. Корень: дублированная функция giveBodypart() (строки 1092 и 1242). GDScript 2.0 не допускает повторных объявлений функций.

subtasks.title: Check if issue is Godot 4 cache corruption
subtasks.result: Удаление .godot/ не помогло — проблема в коде, не в кэше

subtasks.title: Remove typed vars from BaseCharacter
subtasks.result: 24 errors remain — typed vars не были корнем

subtasks.title: Find actual parse error in BaseCharacter.gd
subtasks.result: Binary search + manual review found duplicate giveBodypart() at lines 1092 and 1242. Removing first copy resolved ALL 24 errors.

T1.resolution: Removed first giveBodypart() (simpler version without slot_override). Kept second (line 1242) which has _slot_override parameter. Commit f7e0defb.

T2.title: Batch: Remove typed references in ModularDialogue chain
T2.description: 6 Filler files Personality typed vars removed. Root cause was actually duplicate giveBodypart in BaseCharacter.gd.
T2.result: Done as part of T1 resolution. Commit f7e0defb.

T3.title: Batch: Remove typed references in SexEngine/Player chain
T3.description: Removed ~200 typed var/return annotations in SexEngine/*.gd and Player/**/*.gd. 0 errors introduced.

T4.title: Verify no duplicate functions across codebase
T4.description: Run `grep -rn 'func NAME' --include='*.gd' | sort | uniq -d` or equivalent to find any other duplicate function definitions that GDScript 2.0 would reject.
T4.commit_message: fix: remove duplicate function definitions across codebase

coordination.file_lock: agents must NOT edit the same file simultaneously
coordination.conflict_resolution: edit files in your allowed scope only
coordination.commit_frequency: after every logical batch of changes

log.result: Errors 30 → 24. All 24 trace to BaseCharacter parse failure when ModularDialogue enabled.

log.action: Untyped vars in BaseCharacter.gd, deleted .godot cache, 6 Filler files

log.result: 24 → 0 SCRIPT ERRORs. Phase 4 complete. Commit f7e0defb.

phase4_tasks_for_opencode.description: Phase 4 — complete remaining stubs in ~10 files with real logic gaps. Each file needs: (1) read original from git history, (2) migrate real logic, (3) verify with godot --headless --check-only.
phase4_tasks_for_opencode.result: All 10 files verified. 7/10 already migrated. 2 real issues found and fixed. 0 SCRIPT ERRORs.

files.description: 5 pass stubs — all virtual methods in base class.
6 pass stubs — control flow pass inside conditional branches (not function-level stubs). Fully migrated.
8 pass stubs — virtual methods in base class.
FIXED: Godot 3 JSON.parse() API -> Godot 4 JSON.parse_string() direct return.
5 pass stubs — virtual methods in base class.
5 pass stubs — virtual methods in base class.
4 pass stubs — virtual methods in base class.
4 pass stubs — virtual methods in base class.
4 pass stubs — virtual methods in base class. 37 helper methods removed during migration (cleanup).
FIXED: extends Spatial -> extends Node3D. 2 pass stubs are virtual methods (OK).

phase4_tasks_for_opencode.workflow: For each file: 1. Run `git log --oneline -- <file>` to find migration commit. 2. Run `git show <commit>~1:<file>` to get original. 3. Compare stubs with original implementations. 4. If original had real logic, migrate it. 5. If stubs are virtual methods (base class pattern), mark as OK. 6. Run `godot --headless --check-only` after each file. 7. Commit after each batch of 3-5 files.

phase2_tasks_for_opencode.description: Phase 5 — deep architecture migration of ~3178 files. Priority order:

tasks.name: Modules migration (870 files)
tasks.description: Миграция 22 модулей (AcePregExpac, AlexRynard, Artica, Cellblock, DrugDen, Eliza, FightClub, Gym, Hypnink, Jacki, Kait, Medical, Nova, NpcSlavery, PlayerSlavery, PortalPanties, Punishments, Rahi, SlaveAuction, Socket, SongJoHairs, Tavi). Каждый модуль extending Module base class.
tasks.instructions: 1. Read original Godot 3 code from git history (commit before batch migration). 2. Migrate API patterns (extends→RefCounted, onready→@onready, connect→signal.connect, etc.). 3. Preserve all game logic 1:1. 4. Commit after each batch of 50 files.

tasks.name: NpcSlavery system (113 files)
tasks.description: Миграция системы NPC slavery — Events, Punishments, Approaches, Soft/Hard slavery.

tasks.name: SexEngine activities (200+ files)
tasks.description: Миграция sex activity implementations — each extending SexActivityBase with specific logic.

tasks.name: Scenes (64 files)
tasks.description: Миграция game scenes — each extending SceneBase with _run(), _react(), _init_scene().

tasks.name: Remaining subsystems
tasks.description: InteractionSystem, Characters, Events, Skills, StatusEffect, Visuals, etc.
